query: What are the docket numbers for the filings Google submitted to FERC between June and December 2024? Use your FERC docket tool
final_answer:
Here are the five filings that **Google** (Google LLC and Google Energy LLC) submitted to FERC between June and December 2024:

| # | Filing Date | Filer | Title | Docket Number(s) |
|---|------------|-------|-------|-------------------|
| 1 | **06/28/2024** | Google Energy LLC | Triennial Market Power Analysis for Central Region | **ER10-468-005** |
| 2 | **09/19/2024** | Google LLC | (doc-less) Motion to Intervene | **ER24-2891-000**, **ER24-2888-000**, **ER24-2890-000**, **ER24-2893-000**, **ER24-2894-000**, **ER24-2889-000** |
| 3 | **11/05/2024** | Google Energy LLC | Supplement to Notice of Change in Status | **ER10-2835-011** |
| 4 | **12/10/2024** | Google LLC | Post-Technical Conference Comments | **AD24-11-000** |
| 5 | **12/27/2024** | Google Energy LLC | Triennial Market Power Analysis for SPP Region | **ER10-2835-012** |

**Full docket number list (unique):**

- **ER10-468-005** — Triennial Market Power Analysis, Central Region (filed 6/28/2024)
- **ER24-2891-000, ER24-2888-000, ER24-2890-000, ER24-2893-000, ER24-2894-000, ER24-2889-000** — Motion to Intervene (filed 9/19/2024)
- **ER10-2835-011** — Supplement to Notice of Change in Status (filed 11/5/2024)
- **AD24-11-000** — Post-Technical Conference Comments (filed 12/10/2024)
- **ER10-2835-012** — Triennial Market Power Analysis, SPP Region (filed 12/27/2024)

**Source:** FERC eLibrary AdvancedSearch API, searched with affiliation "Google," covering 2024-06-01 through 2024-12-31. Results saved to `/work/ferc_search_20260613_161420.csv`.
